Current Projects

The Hydrangea Project — A suite of 24 cosmological hydrodynamic zoom-in simulations of massive galaxy clusters.

The BAHAMAS Project — A suite of cosmological hydrodynamical simulations designed to test the impact of baryonic physics on the interpretation of large-scale structure tests of cosmology.

The Auriga Project — A large suite of high-resolution magneto-hydrodynamical simulations of Milky Way-sized galaxies.

The APOSTLE Project — A suite of cosmological hydro-dynamic simulations of twelve volumes selected to match the kinematics of the Local Group members.

The EAGLE Project — A campaign of large-scale hydrodynamical simulations of the Lambda-Cold Dark Matter Universe.
